task_updates.executor_notes: Ran the full 11-file verification bundle via a temporary script and all 11 test files passed (64 tests total). Git status and diff review show the selection/context-menu/shot-creation worktree is not scope-clean at the repository level: there are many pre-existing modified files and untracked new files beyond the T1-T4 edit set, so the repo does not satisfy the 'no out-of-scope edits' or 'zero new files' checks even though the covered regression suite passed.
